results.title: PDF India's Common Compute Capacity Crosses 34,000 GP
results.snippet: India's national compute capacity has crossed 34000 GPUs. Along with this, the selection of three new startups for building India's own Foundation Model, the IndiaAI Mission has taken a significant leap toward strengthening indigenous AI capabilities.
